title: verbascum mucronatum
intro: Verbascum mucronatum, also known as Horned Mullein, is a perennial plant belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family, characterized by its hairy leaves and tall, flowering stalks. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Horned Mullein include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. It is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
